content:
# Shopify Polaris - Overview

Page type: form
Use cases: merchant settings, commerce admin, newsletter signup, configuration form
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/form

Visual traits:
- practical
- clear
- business-oriented
- structured

Use when:
- merchant settings
- commerce admin
- newsletter signup
- configuration form

Avoid when:
- multi-step wizard
- freeform canvas
- marketing signup hero only

AI summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.

# Shopify Polaris - Layout Rules

Page type: form
Use cases: merchant settings, commerce admin, newsletter signup, configuration form
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/form

- Wrap related inputs in a form and use standard form layout spacing.
- Keep one true submit action at the end of the form.
- Use help text when it changes user confidence or prevents mistakes.

AI summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.

Page type: form

- form
- form layout

- submit button
- help text

AI summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.

# Shopify Polaris - Interaction States

Page type: form
Use cases: merchant settings, commerce admin, newsletter signup, configuration form
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/form

- submit
- implicit enter submit
- validation
- reset
- disabled

AI summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.

# Shopify Polaris - Accessibility Notes

Page type: form
Use cases: merchant settings, commerce admin, newsletter signup, configuration form
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/form

- Use the native form element behavior where possible.
- Make keyboard submit behavior intentional; disable implicit submit only when it conflicts with the workflow.

AI summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.

# Shopify Polaris - Implementation Hints

Page type: form
Use cases: merchant settings, commerce admin, newsletter signup, configuration form
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://polaris-react.shopify.com/components/selection-and-input/form

- Use for commerce/admin settings where predictable form behavior matters.
- Do not scatter submit buttons; keep the main submit action clear and late in the flow.

AI summary: Use Polaris form patterns for merchant/admin settings: native form semantics, standard spacing, clear help text, one submit action, and intentional keyboard submit behavior.
